title.en: BUILDINGS OR LIKE STRUCTURES FOR PARTICULAR PURPOSES; SWIMMING OR SPLASH BATHS OR POOLS; MASTS; FENCING; TENTS OR CANOPIES, IN GENERAL (foundations E02D)
Buildings or groups of buildings for dwelling or office purposes; General layout, e.g. modular co-ordination or staggered storeys (E04H3/00 takes precedence)
{Modulation co-ordination}
Dwelling houses; Buildings for temporary habitation, {e.g. summer houses}(small erections for limited occupation E04H1/12 {; collapsible, erectable or rotatable buildings E04B1/343})
Office buildings; Banks (E04H1/12 takes precedence)

Small buildings or other erections for limited occupation, erected in the open air or arranged in buildings, e.g. kiosks, waiting shelters for bus stops or for filling stations, roofs for railway platforms, watchmen's huts or dressing cubicles
Buildings or groups of buildings for public or similar purposes; Institutions, e.g. infirmaries or prisons
Hotels; Motels; Coffee-houses; Restaurants; Shops; Department stores
Museums; Library buildings
Hospitals, infirmaries, or the like; Schools; Prisons
for meetings, entertainments, or sports
Swimming or splash baths or pools
{Devices for producing waves in swimming pools (generating current of water in swimming pools A63B69/125)}
{Floating swimming pools}
{Easily movable or transportable swimming pools}
{made of concrete (E04H4/0012 takes precedence)}
Safety devices; Coverings for baths
Devices or arrangements for circulating water {, i.e. devices for removal of polluted water, cleaning baths or for water treatment}
Parts, details or accessories not otherwise provided for
Buildings or groups of buildings for industrial or agricultural purposes
{Buildings for data processing centers}
Buildings or groups of buildings for industrial purposes, e.g. for power-plants or factories (buildings forming part of cooling plants E04H5/10)
Buildings or groups of buildings for agricultural purposes (silos E04H7/22)
Buildings forming part of cooling plants
Buildings for parking cars, rolling-stock, aircraft, vessels or like vehicles, e.g. garages
{Garages for vehicles on two wheels}
Small garages, e.g. for one or two cars (attached to, or supported by, the vehicle B62D)
Garages for many vehicles
Devices or arrangements peculiar to garages, not covered elsewhere, e.g. securing devices, safety devices {, monitoring and operating schemes; centering devices}
for storing aircraft

Construction or assembling of bulk storage containers employing civil engineering techniques in situ or off the site (tower aspects E04H12/00; storage aspects, e.g. floating roofs, sealing means, filling or discharging means B65D, B65G, F17B, F17C; foundations E02D27/38)
Containers for fluids or gases; Supports therefor
Containers for fluent solids, e.g. silos, bunkers; Supports therefor

Buildings, groups of buildings or shelters adapted to withstand or provide protection against abnormal external influences, e.g. war-like action, earthquake or extreme climate (foundation aspects E02D)
withstanding earthquake or sinking of ground (foundations E02D27/34)
against air-raid or other war-like actions
against other dangerous influences, e.g. tornadoes, floods
against adverse conditions, e.g. extreme climate, pests
Towers; Masts or poles; Chimney stacks; Water-towers; Methods of erecting such structures (cooling towers E04H5/12; derricks for oil drilling E21B15/00)
{Access covers or locks therefor}
{Structures with truss-like sections combined with tubular-like sections}
Structures made of specified materials
Prestressed structures
movable or with movable sections, e.g. rotatable or telescopic
Side-supporting means therefor, e.g. using guy ropes or struts
Sockets or holders for poles or posts {(for sports articles, e.g. floor sockets A63B71/023; for road signs E01F9/673)}
Cross arms
Winding towers for mines
Chimney stacks, e.g. free-standing, or similar ducts (chimneys as part of buildings E04F17/02)
Water-towers
Flagpoles
Arrangements for erecting or lowering towers, masts, poles, chimney stacks, or the like
Monuments; Tombs; Burial vaults; Columbaria
{Accessories for grave sites, e.g. liners, covers, vault lowering devices (E04H13/003 takes precedence)}
{Funeral monuments, grave sites curbing or markers not making part of vaults (E04H13/008 takes precedence)}
{Ventilation systems therefor}
{Columbaria, mausoleum with frontal access to vaults}
{Memorials for cremation ashes (E04H13/006 takes precedence)}

Buildings for combinations of different purposes not covered by any single one of main groups E04H1/00-E04H13/00 of this subclass, e.g. for double purpose (E04H3/02, E04H9/06 take precedence); Buildings of the drive-in type
Tents or canopies, in general
{Hunting, fishing huts or the like}
{Bathing or beach cabins}
{Tents used as toys}

{Tents or tent-like constructions composed partially of rigid panels (E04H15/06 takes precedence; trailer-type vehicles or caravans with foldable or readily disassembled living accommodation comprising flexible elements B60P3/341)}
Tents combined or specially associated with other devices
Tents having plural sectional covers, e.g. pavilions, vaulted tents, marquees, circus tents (inflatable E04H15/20); Plural tents, e.g. modular
inflatable, e.g. shaped, strengthened or supported by fluid pressure
cone shaped, e.g. teepees
Centre-pole supported tents (umbrella-type E04H15/28)
Umbrella type tents
convertible, e.g. from one type tent to another type tent, from tent to canopy or from tent cover into diverse articles
Parts, components, construction details, accessories, interior equipment, specially adapted for tents, e.g. guy-line equipment, skirts, thresholds
Fencing, e.g. fences, enclosures, corrals (features peculiar to electrified fences A01K3/00, H05C; means for allowing passage through fences, barriers, or the like E06B11/00)
{Anti-climbing devices, e.g. fixed spikes}
{Caps or covers for posts}
{Footing elements for fence posts or fence sections}
{in combination with gates}
{Fencing provided with electric elements or components, e.g. fencing member or component, such as fence strands, post, panel or rail, provided with electric elements or components}
Wire fencing, e.g. made of wire mesh (E04H17/14 takes precedence)
Fences constructed of rigid elements, e.g. with additional wire fillings or with posts
Devices for erecting or removing fences
